requirement_topic.en: EMC for BESS Power Electronics and Controls

summary.en: BESS power conversion systems, BMS, controllers, communications modules, and auxiliary electronics can create emissions and immunity issues. UAE project specifications, utility interconnection reviews, customer procurement documents, or component conformity routes may request IEC/CISPR or IEC 61000-series EMC evidence. A confirmed blanket UAE federal EMC certification mandate for every complete stationary BESS unit is not asserted here.
summary.zh: BESS功率变换系统、BMS、控制器、通信模块和辅助电子设备可能产生发射和抗扰度问题。阿联酋项目规范、公用事业并网审查、客户采购文件或组件合格评定路径可能要求IEC/CISPR或IEC 61000系列EMC证据。本文不声称每个完整固定式BESS单元均存在已确认的阿联酋联邦EMC强制认证。
summary.zht: BESS功率變換系統、BMS、控制器、通訊模組和輔助電子設備可能產生發射和抗擾度問題。阿聯酋項目規範、公用事業併網審查、客戶採購文件或組件合格評定路徑可能要求IEC/CISPR或IEC 61000系列EMC證據。本文不聲稱每個完整固定式BESS單元均存在已確認的阿聯酋聯邦EMC強制認證。

standards_or_laws: CISPR emission standards where applicable to equipment type
Project or utility EMC specifications for BESS power electronics

summary.en: China EMC evidence may include GB 4824 for industrial, scientific, and medical equipment radio disturbance characteristics, GB/T 17799 generic EMC standards, and other equipment-specific GB or GB/T standards. Chinese EMC reports can support comparison but should be checked against the IEC/CISPR limits and test setup requested for the UAE project.
summary.zh: 中国EMC证据可能包括GB 4824工业、科学和医疗设备无线电骚扰特性、GB/T 17799通用EMC标准，以及其他设备特定GB或GB/T标准。中国EMC报告可支持对比，但应按阿联酋项目要求的IEC/CISPR限值和测试布置进行核验。
summary.zht: 中國EMC證據可能包括GB 4824工業、科學和醫療設備無線電騷擾特性、GB/T 17799通用EMC標準，以及其他設備特定GB或GB/T標準。中國EMC報告可支持對比，但應按阿聯酋項目要求的IEC/CISPR限值和測試佈置進行核驗。

standards_or_laws: Equipment-specific GB or GB/T EMC standards

gap.en: The usual gap is acceptance, not just testing. Confirm whether the UAE buyer, utility, or conformity body accepts existing GB or CB test data, requires IEC/CISPR reports from an accredited laboratory, or requires site-level EMC mitigation for cabling, earthing, filters, and communications equipment.
gap.zh: 常见差距不只是测试本身，而是接受规则。应确认阿联酋买方、公用事业单位或合格评定机构是否接受现有GB或CB测试数据，是否要求认可实验室出具IEC/CISPR报告，或是否要求针对电缆、接地、滤波器和通信设备进行现场级EMC缓解。
gap.zht: 常見差距不只是測試本身，而是接受規則。應確認阿聯酋買方、公用事業單位或合格評定機構是否接受現有GB或CB測試數據，是否要求認可實驗室出具IEC/CISPR報告，或是否要求針對電纜、接地、濾波器和通訊設備進行現場級EMC緩解。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — may be mandatory for regulated components or under project, utility, owner, or procurement specifications; no blanket complete-BESS EMC mandate asserted here
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where a specific GB EMC standard or CCC catalogue category applies; otherwise project or customer specified

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build an EMC acceptance plan for the exact UAE project and component scope. Existing China EMC reports are useful inputs, but they are not automatic UAE acceptance evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应针对具体阿联酋项目和组件范围制定EMC接受计划。现有中国EMC报告是有用输入，但不等同于阿联酋自动接受证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應針對具體阿聯酋項目和組件範圍制定EMC接受計劃。現有中國EMC報告是有用輸入，但不等同於阿聯酋自動接受證據。
